moments.title: Glastonbury Festival 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The iconic Glastonbury Festival is in full swing at Worthy Farm, Pilton, Somerset, continuing until Sunday, June 28th, 2026, with a massive lineup across its many stages.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: From Pyramid Stage legends to late-night dance tents, Glastonbury is delivering all the festival feels right now! What's been your highlight so far?

angles.name: Headliner Buzz
angles.copy: The headliners are tearing up Worthy Farm! Who's on your must-see list if you were there this weekend at Glastonbury?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam of the year, commence on Monday, June 29th, 2026, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Lawn Tennis Club.

angles.name: Tennis Season
angles.copy: Game, set, match! Wimbledon kicks off on Monday, bringing the best of tennis to our screens for the next two weeks. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's almost time for the strawberries, cream, and incredible tennis! Wimbledon starts Monday – get ready for two weeks of sporting drama.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK's 13th series continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the latest villa drama unfolding as contestants search for romance in Majorca.

angles.name: Daily Recaps
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What are your thoughts on tonight's episode? Any predictions for the next recoupling?

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's got a text? Catch up on all the action.

moments.title: Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod Begins
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod starts on Tuesday, July 1st, 2026, bringing a week-long celebration of global music, dance, and culture to North Wales.

angles.name: Welsh Culture
angles.copy: Get ready for a feast of music and dance! The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod brings the world to Wales from July 1st.

angles.name: International Event
angles.copy: A truly global event right here in North Wales! The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod kicks off next Tuesday. Who's excited?

moments.title: Chris Isaak is 70 Today
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for his distinctive rockabilly-influenced style and hits like 'Wicked Game', celebrates his 70th birthday today, June 26th.

angles.name: Wicked Game
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to the one and only Chris Isaak! 'Wicked Game' is still sending shivers down our spines. What's your favourite Isaak track?

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating 70 years of cool, rockabilly vibes! Chris Isaak, the man behind 'Blue Hotel' and 'Somebody's Crying', turns 70 today!

moments.title: Glenn Medeiros is 56 on Sunday
moments.blurb: American singer Glenn Medeiros, best known for his 1987 global hit 'Nothing's Gonna Change My Love for You', will celebrate his 56th birthday on June 28th.

angles.name: Power Ballad King
angles.copy: Nothing's gonna change our love for this song! Glenn Medeiros turns 56 on Sunday – still one of the greatest power ballads of all time.

angles.name: 80s Classic
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to Glenn Medeiros this Sunday! That voice, that song... pure 80s gold.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger is 48 on Monday
moments.blurb: American singer, dancer, and Pussycat Dolls frontwoman Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish she was celebrating with you? Happy 48th birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger on Monday!

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From the Pussycat Dolls to solo hits, Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 this Monday! A true force in pop music.

moments.title: Debbie Harry is 81 on Wednesday
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic lead vocalist Debbie Harry, a punk and new wave pioneer, will celebrate her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry on Wednesday! Still looking absolutely iconic. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: The ultimate new wave queen, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday this Wednesday! Her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Missy Elliott is 55 on Wednesday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott, a true trailblazer in hip-hop, will turn 55 on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The one and only Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday this Wednesday. A true legend of hip-hop!

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Happy 55th birthday to the visionary Missy Elliott on July 1st! Her music videos alone changed the game.

moments.title: Vince Clarke is 66 on Friday
moments.blurb: British synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, will turn 66 on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Master
angles.copy: From Depeche Mode to Erasure, Vince Clarke has shaped the sound of synth-pop! He turns 66 this Friday. What's your favourite of his bands?

angles.name: Electronic Innovator
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring genius of Vince Clarke, who turns 66 on July 3rd! His electronic soundscapes are iconic.

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76 on Sunday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, Huey Lewis, known for hits like 'The Power of Love', will celebrate his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Rock Icon
angles.copy: It's the power of love, and the power of great music! Huey Lewis turns 76 this Sunday. What's your top Huey Lewis & The News track?

angles.name: Back To The Future
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis on July 5th! His music defined an era, especially for 'Back To The Future' fans!

moments.title: 50 Cent is 51 on Monday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent (Curtis James Jackson III) will celebrate his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 this Monday. What's your favourite track from the hip-hop mogul?

angles.name: Chart Dominator
angles.copy: Celebrating 51 years of one of music's biggest names! Happy birthday to 50 Cent on July 6th.
